input.topic: Storm-0558 Chinese Cloud Email Intrusion Campaign 2023
input.notes: Chinese threat actor Storm-0558 forged authentication tokens using a stolen Microsoft account (MSA) consumer signing key to access cloud-hosted email accounts at approximately 25 organizations including US State Department and other government agencies. Active May-June 2023, discovered July 2023. CISA issued advisory AA23-193A. CSRB reviewed the incident and issued a scathing report in March 2024 citing systemic Microsoft security failures. Distinct from Salt Typhoon telecom intrusion campaign. Government attribution: US government confirmed PRC state-affiliated actor. Bounded scope: token-forging cloud email compromise campaign, not the broader PRC cyber ecosystem.
